memoryArtifacts.headline: Ambrose FOWLER, from NEHGR V-11, pg 1

popularStory.headline: Ambrose Fowler and Jane Alvord History follows:
popularStory.description:
AMBROSE FOWLER was born about 1618, of Dalbury, Lees, Derbyshire, England, to William Fowler (1572-1660) and Sarah Neeld (1599-1638.) He married Jane Alvord, 26 May 1646, in Windsor, Massachusetts.

A …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ambrose Fowler Sr.於大約1625年出生在英國德比夏爾達爾波利時，他的父親Judge William Fowler I of Milford29歲，母親Sarah Tapp27歲。他於1646年5月6日與Joane Alford在英國薩默塞特特斯陶頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1640年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵。他去世於1704年10月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾維斯特費爾德享年80歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾維斯特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ambrose Fowler Sr.于大约1625年出生在英国德比夏爾達爾波利时，他的父亲Judge William Fowler I of Milford29岁，母亲Sarah Tapp27岁。他于1646年5月6日与Joane Alford在英国薩默塞特特斯陶頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1640年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州溫莎女爵。他去世于1704年10月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾維斯特費爾德享年80岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾維斯特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: Ambrose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Late Latin name Ambrosius, from post-classical Greek Ambrosios ‘immortal’. This was borne by various early saints, most notably a 4th-century bishop of Milan. The name has never been common in England, but has enjoyed considerably greater popularity in Roman Catholic Ireland, where the surname Mac Ambrois is Anglicized as McCambridge.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Ambrose Fowler Sr. was born about 1625, in Dalbury, Derbyshire, England, his father, Judge William Fowler I of Milford, was 29 and his mother, Sarah Tapp, was 27. He married Joane Alford on 6 May 1646, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1640. He died on 18 October 1704, in Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 80, and was buried in Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ambrose Fowler Sr. est né environ 1625, à Dalbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Judge William Fowler I of Milford, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Sarah Tapp, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joane Alford le 6 mai 1646, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Windsor, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1640. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1704, à Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ambrose Fowler Sr. um 1625 in Dalbury, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Judge William Fowler I of Milford 29 und seine Mutter Sarah Tapp 27. Er hat am 6. Mai 1646 in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England Joane Alford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1640 hat er in Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1704 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ambrose Fowler Sr. è nato il circa 1625 nel Dalbury, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Judge William Fowler I of Milford, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Tapp, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joane Alford il 6 maggio 1646, nel Whitestaunton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America nel 1640. Morì il 18 ottobre 1704, nel Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Ambrose Fowler Sr.が約1625年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアダルブリーで生まれた時，父Judge William Fowler I of Milfordは29歳，母Sarah Tappは27歳であった。1646年5月6日にイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンでJoane Alfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1640年にはイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドソルに住んでいた。彼は1704年10月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアウエストフィールドで80歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアウエストフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ambrose Fowler Sr.(이)가 대략 1625년 영국 더비실르 다버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Judge William Fowler I of Milford(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Tapp(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1646년 5월 6일 영국 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 Joane Alford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1640년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드소르에서 살았다. 그는 1704년 10월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 웨스트필드에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 웨스트필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ambrose Fowler Sr. nasceu aproximadamente 1625, em Dalbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Judge William Fowler I of Milford, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Tapp, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Alford em 6 de maio de 1646, em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Windsor, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1640. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1704, em Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ambrose Fowler Sr. родился около 1625 г. в местности далбури, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Judge William Fowler I of Milford было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Tapp, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Alford 6 мая 1646 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности виндзор, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1640 году. Он умер 18 октября 1704 г. в местности вестфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности вестфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ambrose Fowler Sr. nació aproximadamente 1625, en Dalbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Judge William Fowler I of Milford, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Sarah Tapp, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joane Alford el 6 de mayo de 1646, en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Windsor, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1640. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1704, en Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Westfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
